---
name: API Version Update
about: Request a module update to a newer Azure REST API version
labels: api-version, from-config-repo
---

## Module

- **Module directory**: `modules/azure/<module_name>/`
- **Current API version**: <!-- from module's main.tf -->
- **Requested API version**: <!-- e.g. 2025-01-01 -->

## Reason for Update

<!-- Why is the newer API version needed? New properties, deprecations, etc. -->

| Property | API Path | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
|          |          |             |

## Breaking Changes

<!-- Any known breaking changes between versions, or "None expected" -->

## Hero Promotion

<!-- Optionally combine this API version update with a hero promotion.
     A hero module exposes ALL writable spec properties, adds schema-derived validation rules,
     ships an extended complete/ example, and includes multiple configurations/ YAMLs. -->

- **Should this update also promote the module to hero quality?**: <!-- yes / no -->
